effect_date.text: วันที่มีผล

root.sql: SELECT sum(tab.row_memno)over(partition by (tab.member_group_type) order by tab.member_group_type , tab.membership_no , tab.sort_payment ) as rowno, tab.* from ( select decode(lag(sc_lon_restruc_head.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type.member_group_type , sc_lon_restruc_head.membership_no ,sc_lon_restruc_det.sort_payment ),sc_lon_restruc_head.membership_no ,0,1) as row_memno , sc_lon_restruc_head.document_no , sc_lon_restruc_head.member_group_no , sc_lon_restruc_head.membership_no , sc_lon_restruc_head.effect_date , sc_lon_restruc_det.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_restruc_det.sort_payment , sc_lon_restruc_det.last_period , sc_lon_restruc_det.balance , sc_lon_restruc_det.payment_amount_old , sc_lon_restruc_det.installment_old , sc_lon_restruc_det.fixed_payment_new , sc_lon_restruc_det.installment_new , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_restruc_head.membership_no ) as memname, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type.member_group_type , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type.member_group_type_name FROM sc_lon_restruc_head , sc_lon_restruc_det , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type WHERE 1=1 and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type.member_group_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group .member_group_type and sc_lon_restruc_head.document_no = sc_lon_restruc_det.document_no and sc_lon_restruc_head.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_lon_restruc_head.approve_status = '2' and sc_lon_restruc_head.cancel_status= '0' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_restruc_head.membership_no = '051176' --and ( sc_lon_restruc_head.effect_date between '01 ม.ค. 2020' and '31 ม.ค. 2023' ) ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type.member_group_type ASC, sc_lon_restruc_head.membership_no ASC, sc_lon_restruc_det.sort_payment ASC )tab
